best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-additemtocart-001 title: user successfully adds an item to their cart module: add item to cart source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - item name: "mouse" - item price: 29.99 test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user clicks on the "add item" button. 3. user selects "mouse" as the item name. 4. user enters "29.99" as the item price. 5. user clicks on the "add" button. 6. system adds the item to the cart. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: item is added to the user's cart.

test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs into the admin system module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: user123 - password: pass123 test steps: 1. user enters "user123" as the username. 2. user enters "pass123" as the password. 3. user clicks on the login button. 4. system verifies the credentials. 5. system displays a success message. expected result: user is logged into the admin system.

test case id: tc-addproduct-002 title: admin fails to add a product due to missing required fields module: add product source pages: 1 preconditions: admin is logged in. test data: - product name: "" - product description: "high-performance laptop with 16gb ram" test steps: 1. admin logs in. 2. admin clicks on the "add product" button. 3. admin leaves the product name field empty. 4. admin enters "high-performance laptop with 16gb ram" as the product description. 5. admin clicks on the "save" button. 6. system checks the input fields. 7. system displays an error message. expected result: product is not added to the system and an error message is displayed.
